title: The Escape from Egghead Tightens
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Marines, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: pirate Island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Does that mean!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tambition always fuels the hearts of true Z Warriors!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There could be a Buncha treasure down there on the ocean floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You pea-brain!! It's not like the world is full of cities of gold!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's all 200 meters deep!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'd be sea beast chow if you went lookin'!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But ain't there ships that can dive?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'd have better luck tryin' to court some mermaids...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How the Devil would we afford one of those?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'd do anything to meet one!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The grand line

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That was even before Noland's time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What an incredible story!! Ook Kee Kee!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It sounds romantic, doesn't it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Anyone else up for another diving expedition?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Woooo Ooooo Oooo!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: GS - Navy General Hospital

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Koby- Sempail!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This must be about the one piece!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It really makes ya think...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna pass out. I'll write everything down later...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's hard to keep up with all these thoughts racing around my head.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just saw the captain. His recovery is going well, but he wants his space.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, things are really coming to a head, aren't they...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...prince?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It sounds like we're gonna get some hard to hear answers soon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's our turn to step up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The new world

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Tashigi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Where are you now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Smoker- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm at the general hospital!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I realize I have been quite vague on this point...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, I can't add anything further other than pure speculation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Keep going!! What did Roger leave behind?!

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
